GetByCliente(Guid, DateTime?, DateTime?)

Retrieves payments for a client, optionally filtered by a date range.

public List<Pago> GetByCliente(Guid clienteId, DateTime? desde, DateTime? hasta)

Parameters

clienteId Guid

The client whose payments to fetch.

desde DateTime?

Optional inclusive lower bound on payment date.

hasta DateTime?

Optional inclusive upper bound on payment date.

Returns

List<Pago>

List of matching payments; empty list if none.
